user.title: Ladestellen Austria
user.description: Get your free API key at [ladestellen.at]({registration_url}). Register your Home Assistant external URL as the referer domain during signup — it is pre-filled below from your current [external URL](/config/network).

data_description.domain: The full domain name you entered at ladestellen.at, without protocol, port or path. Must match the host your Home Assistant requests are served from.
data_description.dynamic_entity: Optional: select a device_tracker (e.g. your phone via the HA companion app) to refresh the station list from your live GPS position. Leave empty for fixed-location mode. In dynamic mode the update interval above is replaced by a 6-hour safety-net timer — actual refreshes are driven by tracker movement (min. 1.5 km / 10 min between refreshes).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Ladestellen Austria
reconfigure.description: Update credentials or location. Existing entities are preserved. Manage your API key at [ladestellen.at]({registration_url}).

data_description.dynamic_entity: Optional: select a device_tracker to refresh from live GPS. Leave empty for fixed-location mode. Pinned stations are hidden in dynamic mode — the list follows your position instead.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Ladestellen Austria
reauth_confirm.description: The upstream API rejected the stored credentials. Enter a fresh API key and the currently-registered domain at [ladestellen.at]({registration_url}).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the upstream API. Check your network and try again.
error.invalid_api_key: Please provide a valid API key.
error.invalid_domain: Enter a valid hostname without protocol, port or path (for example: www.example.com).
error.invalid_location: Pick a valid location on the map.
error.domain_mismatch: The API accepted the key but rejected this referer domain (HTTP 403). Check the registered domains at ladestellen.at.

abort.already_configured: This domain and location combination is already configured.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The new credentials point to a different domain/location. Remove the entry and add it fresh instead.

init.title: Ladestellen Austria options
init.description: Adjust how often the integration polls the upstream API.

api_timeout.message: Ladestellen Austria API timed out after {seconds}s

api_auth_error.message: Ladestellen Austria API rejected the credentials (HTTP {status}). Home Assistant will ask you to re-enter them.

api_invalid_response.message: Ladestellen Austria API returned an unexpected response (status {status}): {error}

tracker_missing.title: Location tracker unavailable
tracker_missing.description: The device_tracker entity **{entity_id}** configured for dynamic mode on **{entry_title}** is unavailable or reports no coordinates. Updates are falling back to the entry's configured location. Either restore the tracker, or reconfigure this entry to switch to fixed-location mode.
